use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PAROXYSMAL NOCTURNAL HEMOGLOBINURIA (PNH) BY ADMINISTRATION OF 200 MG OF IPTACOPAN TWICE DAILY
TREATMENT OF PRIMARY IMMUNOGLOBULIN A NEPHROPATHY (IGAN)

indications.text: FABHALTA is indicated for the treatment of adults with paroxysmal nocturnal hemoglobinuria (PNH).

1.1 Paroxysmal Nocturnal Hemoglobinuria
FABHALTA is indicated for the treatment of adults with paroxysmal nocturnal hemoglobinuria (PNH).
1.2 Immunoglobulin A Nephropathy
FABHALTA is indicated to reduce proteinuria in adults with primary immunoglobulin A nephropathy (IgAN)
